headline: Is Northrop Grumman Expanding Its Presence in the Missile Market?

headline: From $4.8 to $101: Rocket Lab’s Wild Ride Into an $8 Billion SpaceX Showdown
summary: Rocket Lab (NASDAQ:RKLB) shareholders who bought two years ago are now sitting on one of the loudest re-ratings in the market. The stock traded at $4.54 on July 1, 2024. It closed $101.65 on June 30, 2026, a staggering 2,138% two-year run. Retail investors are now treating the ticker like a proxy for the entire ... headline: Lockheed Martin: A Great Entry Point In The Defence Industry (Rating Upgrade)
summary: Lockheed Martin upgraded to Buy after a 20% pullback: new $43B+ missile deals, compelling 16.9x P/E, and 5.7% FCF yield. Click here to read more about LMT
